dashboard.label: ATT&CK Coverage
dashboard.description: Which MITRE ATT&CK techniques are covered by detlab detections, by tactic.

search.query: | inputlookup detlab_cases.csv | stats values(mitre_technique) AS techniques, count BY mitre_tactic

| inputlookup detlab_cases.csv | eval mitre_url="https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/" . replace(mitre_technique, "\\.", "/") . "/" | eval link=case("status"="shipped" AND isnotnull(view_name) AND view_name!="", "/app/detlab/" . view_name, true(), "") | table mitre_tactic, mitre_technique, case_title, status, severity, link, mitre_url | rename mitre_tactic AS Tactic, mitre_technique AS Technique, case_title AS "Case", status AS Status, severity AS Severity
